full_prompt: Design a redesigned injection-molded ratcheting screwdriver body as an open-source consumer-product DFM benchmark, targeting a consumer hardware-store DIY segment. The screwdriver body consists of a handle (150 mm long x 35 mm max diameter), a ratcheting mechanism housing, and a 6.35 mm (1/4 inch) hex bit holder at the distal end. The handle is co-molded with a hard ABS (yield 45 MPa, E 2.3 GPa, density 1050 kg/m^3) core and a TPE grip over-mold (Shore A 65). Internal ratcheting mechanism is a metal pawl + gear assembly and is treated as rigid in this competition (designer-specified off-the-shelf). The tool must deliver up to 5 N-m of torque to the driver bit with a maximum user grip force of 100 N applied around the TPE grip. Pass/fail criteria: (R1) max von Mises stress in the ABS core when 5 N-m torque is applied at the bit with the user gripping at 100 N axial + 20 N-m grip moment must not exceed 30 MPa (ABS yield 45 / SF 1.5), (R2) handle twist (angular deflection between grip and bit) under 5 N-m torque must not exceed 2 degrees to preserve driving feel, (R3) drop test from 1 m onto a hard surface (equivalent 250 N quasi-static impulse) must not crack the ABS core, (R4) handle part must demold with a single line of draw with a minimum draft angle of 1 degree on all vertical faces per DFM best practice, and (R5) total handle assembly mass (ABS core + TPE overmold, excluding metal mechanism) must not exceed 80 g. Vibration, thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are not required. Deliver a STEP AP242 assembly with ABS core, TPE grip, and bit holder as sub-bodies plus a verification report listing max von Mises, handle twist angle, drop result, DFM draft check, and total mass.
short_prompt:
Redesign an injection-molded ratcheting screwdriver handle for a consumer DIY segment: a co-molded ABS core with a TPE Shore A 65 grip overmold, roughly 150 mm long x 35 mm max diameter, with a 1/4-inch hex bit holder at the distal end. Internal ratcheting mechanism (metal pawl + gear) is designer-specified off-the-shelf and treated as rigid. Grip is distributed on the TPE; reaction torque is at the driver bit.

Load cases.
- LC1 max torque: 5 N-m to the bit with user at 100 N grip and 20 N-m grip moment.
- LC2 1 m drop: 250 N equivalent impulse.

Also apply an injection-molding DFM rule set (minimum 1 degree draft on vertical faces, single line of draw). Total handle-assembly mass (ABS core + TPE overmold, excluding metal mechanism) is a commercial-feel constraint.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Draft angles, wall thickness uniformity, and parting-line checks are a DFM rule-set, not FEA.

prompt.title: Ratcheting screwdriver handle (DFM benchmark)
prompt.brief: Design a co-molded ABS + TPE ratcheting screwdriver handle (150 mm x 35 mm) driving 5 N-m torque to a 1/4-inch bit, passing ABS stress, twist, drop, 1-degree DFM draft, and 80 g mass.
